# Saved Souls Foundation
> Animal rescue sanctuary in Khon Kaen, Thailand — specialized in disabled, 
> paralyzed, and abused dogs and cats.

## About
Saved Souls Foundation (SSF) is a registered non-profit organization 
(registration number 1/2560) founded in 2010 by Gabriela Leonhard in 
Ban Kok Gnam, Khon Kaen, northeastern Thailand.

SSF specializes in rescuing and caring for disabled and paralyzed animals 
that other shelters would euthanize. The foundation rescues dogs and cats 
from the illegal dog meat trade, abusive situations, and accidents.

## What We Do
- Rescue disabled, paralyzed, blind, and abused dogs and cats
- Provide wheelchairs and mobility aids for disabled dogs
- Daily swimming therapy for paralyzed animals
- On-site veterinary care including sterilizations and amputations
- Sterilization campaigns for street animals in surrounding areas
- Adoption program (local and international)
- Volunteer program

## Key Facts
- Founded: 2010
- Registered non-profit: October 9, 2017
- Location: Ban Kok Gnam, Ban Fang, Khon Kaen, Thailand
- Animals in care: 300+ dogs, 90+ cats
- Disabled/paralyzed dogs: 60+
- Daily food cost: 5,000 THB (~€145) per day
- Website: https://www.savedsouls-foundation.org

## How to Support
- Donate: https://www.savedsouls-foundation.org/en/donate
- Sponsor a dog: https://www.savedsouls-foundation.org/en/sponsor
- Volunteer: https://www.savedsouls-foundation.org/en/volunteer
- Adopt: https://www.savedsouls-foundation.org/en/adopt
